title: Creamy Korean Asparagus Wrap
description: A creamy and cheesy Korean dish featuring asparagus, wrapped in a pandan leaf, perfect for brunch
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Rinse the asparagus and trim the ends
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the asparagus in a single layer
Drizzle the sesame oil over the asparagus and sprinkle with salt and black pepper
Roast the asparagus in the oven for 12 minutes or until tender
In a blender or food processor, whisk together the gochujang, cream cheese, garlic, and green onions
Stir in the grated mozzarella cheese until well combined
To assemble the wraps, lay a pandan leaf flat and spread a quarter of the cheese mixture down the center of the leaf
Arrange 4-5 spears of roasted asparagus on top of the cheese mixture
Fold the bottom edge of the pandan leaf over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrap to form a tight cylinder
